However, let me add another point to support why option C "Synovial joint" might be even more accurate than D "Diarthrodal joint." While all diarthrodal joints are types of synovial joints, specifying 'synovial' directly addresses the lubricated nature of this joint via fluid within the capsule, enhancing its functionality during diverse movements. Therefore, considering the specific anatomical feature of having synovial fluid, my final agreement leans towards C - Synovial Joint.
